ops.text:
PRE-REGISTERED PROTOCOL (E18, cap $3, aim $0 — pure compute, no LLM calls)

Objective: fit a reliability model over repeated judge votes; locate the strata where judge disagreement concentrates; emit a ranked strata table + concrete per-stratum row-id lists (feeds E19 prompt-hardening, E20 label-noise cross-ref).

INPUT RECONCILIATION (observed, not assumed):
- athome VoteCache (votes.json, the pairwise promotion-gate panel cache): ABSENT from snapshot eval/. Golden labels still null template (labels_template.json), so the panel never spent → no cached pairwise votes exist. Documented, cannot model.
- shadow.db E13 dual-shadow proposals: 51 anchors, each under exactly ONE config (dual nv>=2 == 0); 18 carry both draft+steer text; reactions table has 2 scan_inferred expiries only. NO repeated judge-vote signal. Documented, cannot model.
- feedback.db triage: PRIMARY corpus. 9130 triage rows over 5756 items (dedup_keys); 1676 items have >=2 votes (modelable). Raters = (role in {judge,auditor}) x (prompt_version in {4,5,6}) x (model in {opus, gpt-5.5:medium, gemini-3.5-pro}). This IS the persisted athome judge-vote record for the pipeline.

Outcome variables: is_steering (binary accept/reject; item-level flip rate 265/1676 = 15.8%) primary; category (11-way; flip 534/1676 = 31.9%) secondary. canonical_key NULL across multi-vote set — unused.

Models: (1) per-item empirical-Bayes Beta-Binomial disagreement = "per-item sigma" (robust at n_i in [2,6]); (2) Rasch/1PL IRT via EM to extract rater leniency (theta_j) and decompose disagreement into rater-effect vs item-ambiguity; global 2PL discrimination reported (per-item a_i under-identified at small n).

Strata: category, context-length band (fidelity full/summary + n-message bands), repo/project (parsed from origin_path -Users-yasyf-Code-<proj>), source_kind.

Instrument check (per "evaluate the instrument" memory): permutation/bootstrap null on per-stratum mean disagreement; report which strata exceed the noise floor; raw + EB-shrunk both reported.

SUCCESS CRITERION: a ranked strata table with >=1 stratum whose EB-shrunk disagreement significantly exceeds the global base rate (permutation p<0.05), plus per-flagged-stratum row-id lists written to out/ for E19/E20 handoff.

Workspace: /Users/yasyf/Code/cc-steer-exp0 (uv run --no-sync). DB clones under ~/.cc-steer/experiments/E18-vote-cache-reliability/inputs/ (fresh per E8). Outputs under out/.
